finding: `taskflow close` dry-run passed, but `taskflow close --write` was rejected late by `ATM_RUNNER_STALE_WRITE_REFUSED` because the frozen runner was older than source; the operator had to infer and run the release build before retrying.
expectedBehavior: Pre-close and close dry-run should surface stale-runner write readiness and the required sync command before any write attempt; the write path should report this condition as a readiness blocker rather than a late refusal.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on TASK-AAO-0173 after a successful delivery commit and close dry-run. Running `ATM_RETAIN_RELEASE_ARTIFACTS=1 npm run build` cleared the guard and allowed close.
followUp: Add a stale-runner preflight regression and keep the exact platform-appropriate build/sync command in the close playbook.
